EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.QuickSL.keybi: Reloads the current run save, equivalent to Save and Quit, then Continue.
EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.QuickSL.multi: When hosting, ask all connected clients before Quick Save Load; when disabled, clients are told to reload immediately.
When hosting, allow clients to press the Quick Save Load hotkey to request a synchronized Quick Save Load. When disabled, client requests are rejected immediately.
When a client presses the Quick Save Load hotkey, ask the host first; when disabled, the host proceeds directly to the client confirmation flow.
